tmdb._note: TMDB credentials. The app uses read_access_token (v4 Bearer) by default and only falls back to api_key (v3 query param) if the token is blank. Both are kept here so the API key is on hand if a future feature needs the v3-only flow. Get both at themoviedb.org -> Settings -> API.
tmdb._read_access_token_note: PREFERRED. v4 'API Read Access Token'. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Works across v3 + v4 endpoints. This is the one enrichment uses.
tmdb._api_key_note: OPTIONAL / FUTURE. Legacy v3 'API Key'. Sent as ?api_key=. Not needed today; only used if read_access_token is empty. Keep it here so we don't have to hunt it down later.
